details.test: Task 1: Add beginner yoga class to schedule
Task 2: Join cheapest membership plan with gym & pool
Task 3: Favorite three weekday-evening clubs from different categories
Task 4: Sign up for family-friendly volunteer event under 3 hours
Task 5: Reserve room for board game night
Task 6: Bookmark three music-related news posts from last 6 months
Task 7: Create forum topic about running partners and subscribe
Task 8: Register for higher-rated weekday evening workshop under $30
Task 9: Set weekly newsletter preferences for events, volunteering, and family activities
